decisions.rationale: Adopt the monthly review cadence as proposed; the security-SLA motivation is well-grounded and the maintainer-burden delta is small.

resulting_files.content:
# Spec

## Project intent

Track the open-source maintenance status of a personal blog engine.

## Cadence

The maintainer MUST review issues and pull requests at least once per month. The maintainer MUST publish a monthly summary noting any unresolved security advisories.
